content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible curving leftward, and the car appears to be on course heading westward along the track.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 78, target index = (78+5) % 121 = 83
- WP83: x=1.5399, y=4.4687
- Car: x=1.7659, y=4.4111, heading=-166.09°
- dy = 4.4687 - 4.4111 = +0.0576
- dx = 1.5399 - 1.7659 = -0.2260
- bearing = atan2(0.0576, -0.2260) = 180° - atan(0.0576/0.2260) = 180° - 14.30° = **165.70°**
- delta = 165.70° - (-166.09°) = 331.79° → normalize: 331.79 - 360 = **-28.21°** → right correction needed

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3810m, distance_from_center = 0.0662m, is_left_of_center=true
- edge_distance (left) = 0.3810 - 0.0662 = **0.3148m** → well clear
- delta = -28.21° → steer right (away from left edge) → no boundary concern

Delta ≈ -28.2° → |delta| 15-30°, steer right: steering_angle=-15, speed=1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead but WP83 is to the right of current heading (delta≈-28.2°), requiring moderate right steering to stay on the waypoint line while heading westward.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with long straight along y≈0.683 before curving left around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Left curve spans WP27-44 requiring sustained positive steering ~15°.",
    "After left curve, track straightens westward along y≈2.77 (WP44-55).",
    "WP55-70 region: track bends southwest with gentle-to-moderate left curve.",
    "WP70-85 section: heading ~-166 to -172°, delta consistently around -22 to -28° requiring right correction.",
    "Car consistently 0.04-0.07m left of center in WP77-83 section — no boundary concern.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves; reduce to 1.0 only when delta >30°.",
    "WP80+ region: track continues westward then curves south/southeast back to start.",
    "Track total 121 waypoints, ~17.7m length, car at ~65.6% progress.",
    "Repeated -15° steering corrections working well in WP77-83 range."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.046, 1.944, 1.857, 1.766],
    "y": [4.508, 4.475, 4.443, 4.411],
    "heading": [-176.629, -171.684, -168.328, -166.088]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP83 at (1.540, 4.469): bearing≈165.70°, delta≈-28.21° → moderate right correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -15.0
}
```
